summary: Excellent sounding copy of a strong 1988 show, though reviewers focus more on graphic controversy than audio details.
review: One reviewer praises the recording as an "excellent sounding copy" and calls the concert a "real strong show," indicating high musical quality. No specific comments about source type or mix are provided, and two other reviews raise concerns about the accompanying graphic rather than the audio itself.

ai_rating.rationale: Positive feedback on both performance and sound quality from one reviewer, but limited relevant data and unrelated negative comments lower confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer describes the copy as "excellent sounding" but gives no specifics about whether it is soundboard, audience, or matrix.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Described as a "real strong show" with no detailed comments on set pacing or song transitions.
